items.author: Zara Zhang
items.content_zh: Zara 分享了她很少用 AI 写作的原因：她享受写作过程且写作能力很强，用 AI 反而更耗时间，因为需要不断修改才能达到她的高标准。同时展示了用 AI 生成的 Karpathy 知识管理体系解析 deck。
items.content_en: Zara shares why she rarely uses AI for writing: she enjoys writing and finds it easy, so using AI actually takes more time since her high standards require extensive editing. Also showcased an AI-generated deck explaining Karpathy's knowledge management system.

items.author: Thariq
items.content_zh: Claude Code 的 Monitor Tool 功能极其强大——可以让 Claude 启动开发服务器并实时监控错误。同时 Thariq 认为「prompting」将持续成为极高杠杆的技能，如同写作和演讲一样，是人与 agent 之间沟通带宽的关键。
items.content_en: Claude Code's Monitor Tool is extremely powerful — it lets Claude start a dev server and observe for errors in real time. Thariq also argues 'prompting' will remain an incredibly high-leverage skill, like writing or public speaking — it's the key to growing bandwidth between humans and agents.

items.author: Swyx
items.bio: AI Engineer founder, Latent Space podcast
items.content_zh: Swyx 在 AI Engineer 大会上分享了「AGI Pill」药瓶的幕后故事——这个灵感来自一条推文，药瓶在现场被秒抢，反映了 AI 社区文化正在形成独特的 meme 和仪式感。
items.content_en: Swyx shares the backstory behind the 'AGI Pill' bottles at the AI Engineer conference — inspired by a tweet, the bottles got snapped up instantly, reflecting how the AI community is developing its own unique memes and rituals.

items.author: Peter Steinberger
items.content_zh: Steinberger 找到了 GitHub MCP Server 的开发者（引发社区热议），并持续推动 OpenClaw 社区建设，同时开设 ClosedClaw 问答环节。
items.content_en: Steinberger tracked down the developer who built the GitHub MCP Server (sparking major community buzz), while continuing to drive OpenClaw community building and hosting a ClosedClaw Q&A session.

items.author: Sam Altman
items.content_zh: Altman 宣布 Codex 受到大量好评，OpenAI 将应用户强烈需求推出 100 美元的 ChatGPT Pro 订阅层级。
items.content_en: Altman announces Codex is getting massive love, and OpenAI will launch a $100 ChatGPT Pro tier by popular demand.

items.author: Guillermo Rauch
items.content_zh: Rauch 提出「Agentic Infrastructure 是云的未来」：从服务开发者转向服务 coding agent，从页面部署转向 agent 部署。shadcn init 现在每秒执行一次，展示了新一代软件创建的规模。
items.content_en: Rauch declares 'Agentic Infrastructure is the future of the cloud' — shifting from serving developers to serving coding agents, from deploying pages to deploying agents. shadcn init now runs once per second, showing the scale of new software creation.

items.author: Peter Yang
items.content_zh: Peter Yang 分享了对 AI 工具体验的微妙观察：Opus 在 OpenClaw 上无可替代，但用 Claude Code 做个人助理总感觉不够「属于自己」。同时调侃「Hermes Agent 是 OpenClaw 的奢侈品版本吗？」
items.content_en: Peter Yang shares a nuanced take on AI tool experience: no model is anywhere near as good as Opus for OpenClaw, but using Claude Code as a personal assistant replacement just doesn't feel as 'mine' as OpenClaw. Also quips: 'Is Hermes Agent the luxury bag version of OpenClaw?'

items.author: Nikunj Kothari
items.content_zh: Nikunj 发现 AI 检测工具 Pangram Labs 将他手写的内容误判为「100% AI 生成垃圾」，引发思考：当 AI 检测不可靠时，人类创作者的原创性如何被证明？同时庆祝自己的开源副项目获得 80 个 star。
items.content_en: Nikunj discovers AI detection tool Pangram Labs flagged his hand-written content as '100% AI generated slop' — raising questions about how human creators prove originality when AI detection is unreliable. Also celebrates his open-source side project hitting 80 stars.

items.author: Matt Turck
items.bio: FirstMark Capital VC, MAD Landscape author
items.content_zh: Matt Turck 观察到数据库领域的残酷洗牌：SurrealDB 超越 EdgeDB，EdgeDB 超越 MongoDB，新一代数据库正在快速重新排序市场格局。
items.content_en: Matt Turck observes the database landscape reshuffling: SurrealDB overtaking EdgeDB, EdgeDB overtaking MongoDB — the next-gen database market is rapidly reordering.

items.author: The MAD Podcast (Matt Turck x Felix Rieseberg)
items.bio: MAD Podcast host x Anthropic Cowork Engineering Lead
items.content_zh: 深度对谈 Anthropic 的 Felix Rieseberg：Claude Mythos 是一个真正的「阶跃式变化」，模型在网络安全方面展现出超强能力；Cowork 的诞生源于非技术用户对 Claude Code 的巨大潜在需求——人们为了使用它「爬过碎玻璃」；本地计算机被严重低估；执行成本趋零后，品味（taste）成为关键瓶颈；AI 正处于诺基亚 3320 时代，iPhone 时刻尚未到来。Felix 建议创业者关注两个方向：运行在老旧 Windows 7 设备上的长尾行业软件，以及将 AI 推向物理世界。
items.content_en: Deep conversation with Anthropic's Felix Rieseberg: Claude Mythos is a genuine 'step-function change' with outsized cybersecurity capabilities; Cowork was born from overwhelming latent demand from non-technical users 'crawling over glass' to use Claude Code; the local computer is underappreciated; with execution costs approaching zero, taste becomes the key bottleneck; we're in AI's Nokia 3320 era — the iPhone moment hasn't arrived. Felix advises founders to explore two areas: long-tail legacy software on old Windows 7 devices, and pushing AI into the physical world.

items.author: Aaron Levie
items.content_zh: Levie 认为大家严重低估了「不像软件的领域」对软件和自动化的总需求。AI 采用呈现两极分化：大多数用户还在用聊天工具，另一端的人已经在部署长期运行的 agent 执行真正的工作。同时他强调 prompting 就像给新同事清晰指令一样不可或缺。
items.content_en: Levie argues everyone is substantially underestimating total demand for software in areas that don't 'feel like software.' AI adoption is a tale of two cities: most users interact via chat, while others deploy long-running agents producing real work. He also emphasizes prompting is as essential as giving clear instructions to a new colleague.

items.author: Andrej Karpathy
items.bio: AI researcher, ex-Tesla AI Director, OpenAI founding team
items.content_zh: Karpathy 指出当前大众对 AI 能力的理解存在巨大鸿沟：很多人还停留在去年免费版 ChatGPT 的印象里，而前沿模型的能力已经质变。OpenClaw 的爆发正是因为第一次让大量非技术用户真正体验到了最新 agentic 模型的能力。
items.content_en: Karpathy highlights a growing gap in public understanding of AI capability: many people's views are stuck on last year's free-tier ChatGPT, while frontier models have leaped ahead. The OpenClaw moment was so big because it was the first time a large group of non-technical users truly experienced the latest agentic models.

items.author: Josh Woodward
items.content_zh: Google 的 Lyria 3 音乐模型在不到 50 天内已生成超过 1 亿首歌曲。为庆祝这一里程碑，Gemini App 向所有用户免费开放完整音乐生成能力。
items.content_en: Google's Lyria 3 music model has generated over 100 million songs in under 50 days. To celebrate, Gemini App is unlocking full music generation power for all users for free.

items.author: Garry Tan
items.content_zh: Garry Tan 开源了 GBrain——让 OpenClaw 和 Hermes Agent 拥有对 1 万多个 markdown 文件的完美全记忆能力，MIT 许可，帮助用户构建自己的 mini-AGI。
items.content_en: Garry Tan open-sourced GBrain — giving OpenClaw and Hermes Agent perfect total recall over 10,000+ markdown files. MIT-licensed, designed to help users build their own mini-AGI.

items.author: Dan Shipper
items.content_zh: Dan Shipper 分享了 Sonnet「phone a friend」调用 Opus 的功能评价，称这是非常实用的特性。同时为对 AI 发展感到焦虑的人制作了一段安抚视频。
items.content_en: Dan Shipper highlights the Sonnet 'phone a friend' Opus feature as very useful. Also released a calming video for people still freaking out about AI developments.

items.author: Claude
items.content_zh: Claude 平台正式推出 Advisor Tool（beta）：在 Messages API 调用中添加 advisor 工具，Sonnet/Haiku agent 在运行中遇到难点时自动咨询 Opus，获取计划后继续执行，全程在单个 API 请求中完成。
items.content_en: Claude Platform launches Advisor Tool in beta: add the advisor tool to your Messages API call, and when your Sonnet or Haiku agent hits a hard decision mid-run, it consults Opus, gets a plan, and continues — all within a single API request.

items.author: Cat Wu
items.content_zh: Anthropic 大幅简化了 Claude Code 在 AWS Bedrock 和 Google Vertex 上的配置流程，降低企业接入门槛。
items.content_en: Anthropic made setting up Claude Code with AWS Bedrock and Google Vertex much faster, lowering the barrier for enterprise adoption.

items.author: Alex Albert
items.content_zh: Anthropic 推出「Advisor」机制：让 Sonnet 在遇到难题时可以「打电话给朋友」——调用 Opus 获取建议。在 SWE-bench 多语言评测中，Sonnet + Opus Advisor 比纯 Sonnet 高 2.7 个百分点，同时每任务成本降低 11.9%。
items.content_en: Anthropic introduces the 'Advisor' mechanism: Sonnet can 'phone a friend' by calling Opus when facing hard decisions. On SWE-bench Multilingual, Sonnet with Opus advisor scored 2.7 points higher than Sonnet alone while costing 11.9% less per task.
